HTTP client error calling http://localhost:53709/test: 406 Not Acceptable timestamp = 2026-06-30T15:25:58.643257600, HttpExecutorNoRetryTest:clientErrorsAreNeverRetried = |-----------------------jqwik----------------------- tries = 100 | # of calls to property checks = 100 | # of not rejected calls generation = RANDOMIZED | parameters are randomly generated after-failure = SAMPLE_FIRST | try previously failed sample, then previous seed when-fixed-seed = ALLOW | fixing the random seed is allowed edge-cases#mode = MIXIN | edge cases are mixed in edge-cases#total = 20 | # of all combined edge cases edge-cases#tried = 13 | # of edge cases tried in current run seed = 4668722277956726687 | random seed to reproduce generated values
